{{CargoRelic
|name=Yamato Mirror
|rank=AAA
|affct=FTH
|birthday=10-25
|source=Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF), Wishing (0.14%)
|description=On October 25, 1160 A.D., this mirror was offered to the court of Yamato.

Yamato Mirror is an ancient bronze mirror inscribed with the word "Unparalleled" by the craftsman.

The reverse of this thin and circular mirror is elaborately incised with birds and beasts by using the bas-relief technique. The exquisite and vivid composition makes it a rare treasure.
|fame=39
|art=51
|fth=75
|civ=34
|tech=44
|ss1=Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail DEF +6<br>Ninjutsu Progress: 80/80
|ss2=Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail ATK +8<br>Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail DEF +8<br>Ninjutsu Progress: 80/80
|ss3=Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail ATK +10<br>Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail DEF +10<br>Ninjutsu Progress: 80/80
|ss4=Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail ATK +<br>Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail DEF +<br>Ninjutsu Progress: 80/80
|ss5=Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail ATK +18<br>Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail DEF +18<br>Ninjutsu Progress: 80/80
|ss7=Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail ATK +18<br>Per 10 Ninjutsu LVLs, Snail DEF +18<br>Ninjutsu Progress: 80/80<br>Snail DEF +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Yamato skill II.png|50px]] Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, Snail ATK +30
|skill2=[[File:Yamato skill II.png|50px]] Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, 2x Green Card Drops +7.5%
}}

[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Yamato Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Yamato Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Card Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Zombie Gene Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:Relic Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Ninjutsu LVL]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Purple Relics]]
[[Category:Slug Dragonling Boost]]
